description_long: This object consists of a cardboard tray holding twelve identical snack cups, each with a blue lid and a clear plastic body. The cups are arranged in a 3x4 grid within the tray, and two additional cups are placed outside the tray for display. The lids feature a yellow and white label with text and graphics, while the cups themselves are transparent, revealing a white or light-colored snack inside. The tray is shallow and brown, designed to keep the cups organized and easy to transport. The cups appear to be made of plastic with foil or plastic seals under the lids. The overall presentation suggests a commercial multipack of individually portioned snacks, suitable for retail or convenience settings.
description: A cardboard tray holds twelve clear plastic snack cups with blue lids and yellow-white labels, plus two extra cups displayed outside the tray. The cups are transparent, showing a light snack inside, and the packaging is designed for retail display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tray of twelve snack cups and two individual cups, one with a blue lid and one with a silver seal.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the arrangement of the cups in the tray and the single cup with a silver seal at the back.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the tray of cups and two individual cups, clearly showing the transparent bodies and blue lids.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view focusing on the tray's back row and the single cup with a silver seal positioned behind the tray.
attribute_packaging_type: plastic cup with foil/plastic seal and cardboard tray
